title: TCP State Machine & Handshake Optimization
description: Trace the states of the TCP state machine during connection establishment and termination. Evaluate the impact of SYN cookies on mitigating SYN flood attacks. Analyze how TCP Fast Open (TFO) reduces connection establishment latency.
objectives: Trace the states of the TCP state machine during connection establishment and termination.
Evaluate the impact of SYN cookies on mitigating SYN flood attacks.
Analyze how TCP Fast Open (TFO) reduces connection establishment latency.
